verdict: GO for gated eSpace-mainnet soft-launch with conditions; no real bug in PR #252

findings.title: Manual price oracle has no staleness or sanity bounds
findings.exploit: stale price -> vault opened over-MCR is undercollateralized at true price; zero/low price freezes vaults
findings.mitigation_gated_launch: dev-gated opens + small debt ceiling + active price monitoring

findings.title: RPC provider concentration (Confura-only); mainnet needs independent providers
findings.note: min_quorum=1 still requires strict-majority=2-of-3; risk is single operator

findings.title: confirm_interest_mint_in_state has no local status guard (currently unreachable to exploit)
findings.reachability: (Open, collateral==0) is unreachable: open requires collateral>0; partial withdraw stays CR-checked>0; full withdraw sets Closing; withdraw blocked while pending_interest>0
findings.recommendation: add status!=Open guard to confirm_interest_mint_in_state + pending_interest==0 to the close shortcut (cheap defense-in-depth)

findings.title: Withdrawal CR validated at enqueue, not at settlement confirm
findings.note: requires admin price-move on own op; folds into F-01

false_positives.title: Interest harvest vs settlement confirm pre_total race
false_positives.why: no .await between read_state(pre_total) and mutate_state(confirm); IC atomic between awaits

false_positives.title: Double add-back on reverted NativeWithdrawal
false_positives.why: per-op CAS (still-Inflight?) inside the single mutate_state

false_positives.title: Reused vault IDs carry stale last_interest_accrual_ns
false_positives.why: monotonic counter (never reused) + on-chain minted[vault_id] guard

false_positives.title: Interest rounding/resubmit double-count
false_positives.why: pending_interest_mint_e8s!=0 harvest filter + resubmit reuses stored op.amount_e8s

false_positives.title: min_quorum=1 => 1-of-N reads
false_positives.why: required agreement = max(1, strict_majority=2) = 2; reclassified as F-04 operator concentration
